sidebar.tagsEmpty: Tags will appear here as you add them to dumps.
project.deleteDescription: Dumps will be moved to Unassigned. This cannot be undone.

project.selectProject: Select a project to open its workspace
project.chooseWorkspace: Choose which project workspace and summary history you want to browse.
project.chooseWorkspaceDescription: All Projects can still generate summaries, but workspace notes are project-specific.
tags.deleteDescription: It will be removed from all dumps and filters.
dump.createProjectToStart: Create a project to start dumping.
dump.selectProjectToStart: Select a project to start dumping.
summary.title: Summaries
summary.subtitle: Browse a project workspace beside your AI summaries.
summary.projectHelp: Choose which project workspace and summary history you want to browse.
summary.noneSaved: No saved summaries for this view yet.
summary.generateHelp: Generate a summary to capture the latest dump activity and append it to the project workspace.
summary.createNoteHelp: Create a note from the workspace toolbar to start writing.
summary.notePlaceholder: Write project notes here. Insert dump references to keep source material linked.
summary.selectProject: Select a project to open its workspace
summary.selectProjectHelp: All Projects can still generate summaries, but workspace notes are project-specific.
settings.title: Summary Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the AI backend used for daily and weekly summaries.
settings.themeModeHelp: Choose whether the app follows the system appearance or stays fixed in light or dark mode.
settings.colorSchemeHelp: Switch the app palette instantly while keeping your mode preference separate.
settings.apiKeyHelp: Saved locally on this machine and only used for summary generation requests.
settings.nextSummaryHelp: Changes apply to the next generated summary.
settings.openaiBaseUrlHelp: Use a full OpenAI-compatible API base URL, usually including /v1.
settings.claudeBaseUrlHelp: Anthropic Claude API base URL is usually https://api.anthropic.com/v1.
export.noProjectDumps: No dumps in this project to export
import.title: Import to Project?
import.description: Dumps will be added to {name}. Existing dumps will not be affected.
workspace.insertReferenceDescription: Pick the project note that should receive these dump references.
workspace.chooseProjectAndNote: Choose a project and note to continue.
workspace.createProjectBeforeReferences: Create a project before inserting dump references into a note.
